description: Snapshot history of the repository by version and Assessment Year. Each entry corresponds to a git tag.

versions.summary: Initial knowledge architecture. Directory structure, all schemas, 5 seed rules (R-0001 to R-0005), 1 decision tree (DT-001), 3 validations, 1 synthetic case, 3 tests, 2 AI prompts, all registries, dependency graph, confidence model, conflict resolver, lifecycle model, and rule authoring guide.
